Proof scripts

theory Chaum_Unforgeability begin

Message theory

Multiset rewriting rules and restrictions (7)

Tactic(s)

Raw sources (12 cases, deconstructions complete)

Refined sources (12 cases, deconstructions complete)

add lemma

lemma exec:
  exists-trace "∃ x #i. Spend( x ) @ #i"
edit lemma or delete lemma
simplify
solve( Private_Ch( x ) ▶₀ #i )
  case B_2
  solve( St_S_1( $B, x ) ▶₁ #i )
    case S_1
    solve( !KU( sign(~x, ~ltkB) ) @ #vk.3 )
      case B_1
      solve( !KU( sign(~x, ~ltkB.1) ) @ #vk.5 )
        case B_1
        SOLVED // trace found
      qed
    qed
  qed
qed

add lemma

lemma unforgeability:
  all-traces
  "∀ x #j.
         (Spend( x ) @ #j) ⇒
         (∃ #i.
           ((Withdraw( x ) @ #i) ∧ (#i < #j)) ∧
           (¬(∃ #l. (Spend( x ) @ #l) ∧ (¬(#l = #j)))))"
edit lemma or delete lemma
simplify
solve( Private_Ch( x ) ▶₀ #j )
  case B_2
  solve( St_S_1( $B, x ) ▶₁ #j )
    case S_1
    solve( !KU( sign(~x, ~ltkB) ) @ #vk.3 )
      case B_1
      solve( (#l < #j) ∥ (#j < #l) )
        case case_1
        solve( Private_Ch( ~x ) ▶₀ #l )
          case B_2
          by contradiction /* cyclic */
        qed
      next
        case case_2
        solve( Private_Ch( ~x ) ▶₀ #l )
          case B_2
          by contradiction /* cyclic */
        qed
      qed
    next
      case c_sign
      by solve( !KU( ~ltkB ) @ #vk.5 )
    qed
  qed
qed

add lemma

end

2. induction

a. autoprove (A. for all solutions)
b. autoprove (B. for all solutions) with proof-depth bound 5
s. autoprove (S. for all solutions) for all lemmas

formulas: ∃ x #i. (Spend( x ) @ #i)

lemmas:
  ∀ x #j #k. (Deposited( x ) @ #j) ∧ (Deposited( x ) @ #k) ⇒ #j = #k

allowed cases: refined
